name: clip-semantic-slam
paperTitle: CLIP as Semantic Features for 4D Dynamic SLAM
content:
## Introduction

CLIP embeddings provide semantic understanding of scenes, improving SLAM robustness beyond geometric features alone. This approach enables practical implementation of advanced techniques without extensive theoretical background.

## Core Concept

CLIP embeddings provide semantic understanding of scenes, improving SLAM robustness beyond geometric features alone.

